sources.title: Project Catalog Help - How to find a project in Project Catalog
sources.signal: Project Catalog has clear category groupings and supports browsing by category.

sources.title: Project Catalog Help - What is Project Catalog on Upwork?
sources.signal: Projects are purchased without proposals, with pricing, scope and timing clearly defined.

sources.title: Project Catalog Help - Project Catalog
sources.signal: Project Catalog supports fixed-price projects, hourly projects, consultations and agencies.

sources.title: Upwork In-Demand Skills 2026
sources.signal: Upwork publishes demand signals by work category and skill growth.

sources.title: Upwork Project Catalog Landing Page
sources.signal: Category browsing and packaged service discovery are visible on the public catalog surface.

notableSignals: Services are packaged as predefined offers with clear scope, price and timing.
Clients can compare tiers, add-ons and deliverables without opening a proposal thread.
The category selected must reflect a service the freelancer can actually offer.

methodologyNotes: The report is based on completed jobs and freelancer earnings from the previous calendar year.
The public signal is useful for spotting categories and skills with sustained demand.
These signals should be validated by the automated research agent against live marketplace observations before choosing a niche.
